flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mount Saint Mary's University fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (46.7% → 33.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mount Saint Mary's University rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($25.4k → $30.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mount Saint Mary's University rose 11% between 2007 and 2010 ($13.6k → $15.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Mount Saint Mary's University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (53.4% vs 61.2%).
